Everything Your Child Needs to Succeed

A complete virtual school — in one platform

🏫
Virtual Classroom
Enter a classroom, meet your personal AI teacher, and learn step-by-step.
🗣️
Voice-Enabled Teachers
Grade-matched teachers for every level. Your teacher reads lessons and examples aloud, guiding you step by step.
📚
CAPS & IEB Aligned
All topics follow the official ATP (Annual Teaching Plan) per grade and term.
✅
60 Questions Per Topic
60 questions per topic across Lower, Medium and Higher difficulty — building genuine deep understanding.
📂
Grade-Specific Resources
Past papers, summaries and formula sheets — all allocated to the correct grade.
🏆
Gamified & Fun
Earn XP, badges, streaks, and compete on the leaderboard. Learning is exciting!
